[portfolio_aboubacar.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28475218/portfolio_aboubacar.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Aboubacar Kone - Portfolio BTS SIO SISR</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0e27 0%, #1a1a2e 50%, #16213e 100%);
            color: #ffffff;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        /* Navigation futuriste */
        .navbar {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            width: 100%;
            background: rgba(10, 14, 39, 0.95);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border-bottom: 1px solid #00d4ff;
            z-index: 1000;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .nav-container {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .logo {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #00d4ff;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5);
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            list-style: none;
            gap: 2rem;
        }

        .nav-links a {
            color: #ffffff;
            text-decoration: none;
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 25px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
        }

        .nav-links a:hover {
            color: #00d4ff;
            background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1);
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
        }

        /* Hero Section */
        .hero {
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
        }

        .hero-content {
            text-align: center;
            z-index: 2;
            animation: slideUp 1s ease-out;
        }

        .hero h1 {
            font-size: 4rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00d4ff, #ffffff, #00ff88);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
        }

        .hero .subtitle {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: #a0a0a0;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            animation: fadeIn 1.5s ease-out;
        }

        .cta-button {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00d4ff, #00ff88);
            color: #000;
            text-decoration: none;
            border-radius: 50px;
            font-weight: bold;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .cta-button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5);
        }

        /* Particules animées */
        .particles {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .particle {
            position: absolute;
            width: 2px;
            height: 2px;
            background: #00d4ff;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: float 6s infinite linear;
        }

        /* Sections */
        .section {
            padding: 5rem 2rem;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            color: #00d4ff;
            position: relative;
        }

        .section-title::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -10px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 100px;
            height: 3px;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00d4ff, #00ff88);
        }

        /* Grid des compétences */
        .skills-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 2rem;
            margin-top: 3rem;
        }

        .skill-card {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05));
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 2rem;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .skill-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-10px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            border-color: #00d4ff;
        }

        .skill-icon {
            font-size: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            color: #00ff88;
        }

        .skill-card h3 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            color: #00d4ff;
        }

        /* Projets */
        .projects-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(350px, 1fr));
            gap: 2rem;
            margin-top: 3rem;
        }

        .project-card {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05));
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 2rem;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .project-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: -100%;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1), transparent);
            transition: left 0.5s ease;
        }

        .project-card:hover::before {
            left: 100%;
        }

        .project-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-10px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            border-color: #00d4ff;
        }

        .project-tag {
            display: inline-block;
            background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            color: #00d4ff;
            padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
            border-radius: 15px;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            margin: 0.2rem;
        }

        /* Timeline */
        .timeline {
            position: relative;
            margin: 3rem 0;
        }

        .timeline::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 2px;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #00d4ff, #00ff88);
        }

        .timeline-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin: 2rem 0;
            position: relative;
        }

        .timeline-content {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05));
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            width: 45%;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .timeline-item:nth-child(even) .timeline-content {
            margin-left: auto;
        }

        .timeline-dot {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 15px;
            height: 15px;
            background: #00d4ff;
            border-radius: 50%;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5);
        }

        /* Contact */
        .contact-form {
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        .form-group input,
        .form-group textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 1rem;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 10px;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 1rem;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .form-group input::placeholder,
        .form-group textarea::placeholder {
            color: #a0a0a0;
        }

        .form-group input:focus,
        .form-group textarea:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #00d4ff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
        }

        .contact-link {
            color: #00d4ff;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            text-decoration: none;
            display: inline-block;
            margin-top: 1rem;
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 10px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .contact-link:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1);
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* Footer */
        .footer {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 2rem;
            background: rgba(10, 14, 39, 0.8);
            border-top: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
        }

        /* Animations */
        @keyframes slideUp {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(50px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; }
            to { opacity: 1; }
        }

        @keyframes float {
            from { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
            to { transform: translateY(-100px) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0; }
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; }
            .nav-links { display: none; }
            .timeline::before { left: 20px; }
            .timeline-content { width: calc(100% - 60px); margin-left: 60px !important; }
            .timeline-dot { left: 20px; }
        }

        /* À propos styles */
        .about-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(400px, 1fr));
            gap: 2rem;
            margin-top: 3rem;
        }

        .about-card {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05));
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .about-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            border-color: #00d4ff;
        }

        .about-icon {
            font-size: 4rem;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            animation: float-icon 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes float-icon {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
        }

        .about-card h3 {
            color: #00d4ff;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .about-text {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            color: #d0d0d0;
            text-align: justify;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .about-container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        }
        /* =============================================
           CERTIFICATIONS
        ============================================= */
        .cert-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(420px, 1fr));
            gap: 2rem;
            margin-top: 2rem;
        }

        .cert-card {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rgba(255,255,255,0.05));
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 2rem;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .cert-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: -100%;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(0,212,255,0.07), transparent);
            transition: left 0.5s ease;
        }

        .cert-card:hover::before { left: 100%; }

        .cert-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            border-color: #00d4ff;
        }

        .cert-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 1.2rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
        }

        .cert-logo {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-weight: 900;
            font-size: 1rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .cert-logo-ibm {
            background: #1F70C1;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(31,112,193,0.4);
        }

        .cert-logo-cnil {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E84040, #3B5998);
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(232,64,64,0.35);
        }

        .cert-header-info { flex: 1; }

        .cert-name {
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00d4ff;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }

        .cert-issuer {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #a0a0a0;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }

        .cert-date {
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            color: #00ff88;
        }

        .cert-desc {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: #c0c0c0;
            line-height: 1.7;
            margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
        }

        .cert-tags { margin-bottom: 1.4rem; }

        .cert-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .cert-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem;
            border-radius: 25px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .cert-btn-dl {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00d4ff, #00ff88);
            color: #000;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,212,255,0.25);
        }

        .cert-btn-dl:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,212,255,0.4);
        }

        .cert-btn-verify {
            background: rgba(0,212,255,0.1);
            color: #00d4ff;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.4);
        }

        .cert-btn-verify:hover {
            background: rgba(0,212,255,0.2);
            box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,212,255,0.3);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .cert-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        }


        /* =============================================
           VEILLE TECHNOLOGIQUE - Styles RSS
        ============================================= */
        .veille-wrapper {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.07), rgba(255,255,255,0.03));
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 2rem;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            margin-top: 2rem;
        }

        .vt-header-bar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .vt-title-bar {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #00d4ff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .vt-live-dot {
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #00ff88;
            animation: vt-pulse 2s infinite;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        @keyframes vt-pulse {
            0%,100% { opacity: 1; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #00ff88; }
            50% { opacity: 0.4; box-shadow: none; }
        }

        .vt-status-text {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #a0a0a0;
            margin-left: 4px;
        }

        .vt-refresh-btn {
            padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
            background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.4);
            border-radius: 25px;
            color: #00d4ff;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .vt-refresh-btn:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
        }

        .vt-refresh-btn:disabled {
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }

        .vt-stats-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .vt-stat-box {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .vt-stat-num {
            font-size: 1.6rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00d4ff;
        }

        .vt-stat-lbl {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: #a0a0a0;
            margin-top: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        }

        .vt-sources-bar {
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .vt-sources-label {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #a0a0a0;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .vt-sources-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .vt-src-pill {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
            border-radius: 20px;
            color: #c0c0c0;
        }

        .vt-src-color {
            width: 7px;
            height: 7px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .vt-filters-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .vt-filter-chip {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            padding: 5px 14px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            background: transparent;
            color: #a0a0a0;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.25s ease;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .vt-filter-chip:hover {
            border-color: #00d4ff;
            color: #00d4ff;
        }

        .vt-filter-chip.active {
            background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            border-color: #00d4ff;
            color: #00d4ff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
        }

        .vt-articles-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
        }

        .vt-article-card {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .vt-article-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: -100%;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.06), transparent);
            transition: left 0.5s ease;
        }

        .vt-article-card:hover::before { left: 100%; }

        .vt-article-card:hover {
            border-color: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5);
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.12);
        }

        .vt-card-top {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .vt-article-title {
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #e8e8e8;
            line-height: 1.45;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .vt-badge {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            padding: 3px 9px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .badge-Sécurité  { background: rgba(220,50,50,0.25);  color: #ff7070; border: 1px solid rgba(220,50,50,0.4);  }
        .badge-Réseau    { background: rgba(0,180,255,0.2);   color: #60d0ff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,180,255,0.35); }
        .badge-Cloud     { background: rgba(50,200,100,0.2);  color: #70e080; border: 1px solid rgba(50,200,100,0.35);}
        .badge-IA        { background: rgba(160,80,255,0.2);  color: #c080ff; border: 1px solid rgba(160,80,255,0.35);}
        .badge-Système   { background: rgba(255,180,0,0.2);   color: #ffc040; border: 1px solid rgba(255,180,0,0.35); }

        .vt-card-meta {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 6px;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #808080;
        }

        .vt-card-meta span { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; }

        .vt-excerpt {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #909090;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin-top: 8px;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .vt-read-link {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: #00d4ff;
            text-decoration: none;
            margin-top: 10px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .vt-read-link:hover {
            color: #00ff88;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .vt-skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 25%, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            border-radius: 14px;
            height: 150px;
            animation: vt-shimmer 1.5s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes vt-shimmer {
            0% { background-position: 200% 0; }
            100% { background-position: -200% 0; }
        }

        .vt-empty-msg {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 3rem 1rem;
            color: #606060;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }

        .vt-tableau-link {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 2rem;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .vt-articles-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .vt-stats-row { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Navigation -->
    <nav class="navbar">
        <div class="nav-container">
            <div class="logo">Aboubacar Kone</div>
            <ul class="nav-links">
                <li><a href="#accueil">Accueil</a></li>
                <li><a href="#apropos">À propos</a></li>
                <li><a href="#competences">Compétences</a></li>
                <li><a href="#projets">Projets</a></li>
                <li><a href="#parcours">Parcours</a></li>
                <li><a href="#certifications">Certifications</a></li>
                <li><a href="#veille">Veille Technologique</a></li>
                <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- Hero Section -->
    <section id="accueil" class="hero">
        <div class="particles"></div>
        <div class="hero-content">
            <h1>Aboubacar Kone</h1>
            <p class="subtitle">Étudiant BTS SIO SISR • Spécialiste Infrastructure & Réseaux</p>
            <a href="#projets" class="cta-button">Découvrir mes projets</a>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- About me -->
    <section id="apropos" class="section">
        <h2 class="section-title">About me</h2>
        <div class="about-container">
            <div class="about-card">
                <div class="about-icon">👨‍💻</div>
                <p class="about-text">
                    Étudiant en BTS SIO, je suis passionné par la technologie depuis toujours. Ma curiosité et mon intérêt pour ce domaine m'ont conduit à me plonger dans l'univers de la cybersécurité. Étant enthousiaste, créatif, persévérant et ambitieux, je m'investis pleinement dans ma formation.
                </p>
                <div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">
                    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/aboubacarkone" target="_blank" style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem; background: #0077b5; color: white; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: bold; transition: all 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 119, 181, 0.3);">
                        <span style="font-size: 1.2rem; margin-right: 0.5rem;">💼</span> Profil LinkedIn
                    </a>
                    <a href="#" onclick="alert('Veuillez télécharger votre CV et le placer dans le même dossier que ce fichier HTML, puis remplacez le # par le nom du fichier (ex: CV_Aboubacar_Kone.pdf)'); return false;" style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem; background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00d4ff, #00ff88); color: #000; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: bold; transition: all 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);">
                        <span style="font-size: 1.2rem; margin-right: 0.5rem;">📄</span> Télécharger mon CV
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="about-card">
                <div class="about-icon">🎯</div>
                <h3>Mon Projet Professionnel</h3>
                <p class="about-text">
                    Mon projet professionnel consiste à évoluer dans le domaine de l'informatique, en commençant par mon BTS SIO en alternance, où je me forme en tant que technicien support et administrateur réseau. Mon objectif à moyen terme est de poursuivre mes études vers un Master en Cybersécurité, afin de devenir expert dans la protection des systèmes informatiques. À long terme, je vise à occuper un poste stratégique, comme celui de responsable de la sécurité des systèmes d'information (RSSI), pour sécuriser les infrastructures et anticiper les cybermenaces.
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Compétences -->
    <section id="competences" class="section">
        <h2 class="section-title">Compétences Techniques</h2>
        <div class="skills-grid">
            <div class="skill-card">
                <div class="skill-icon">🖥️</div>
                <h3>Administration Système</h3>
                <p>Windows Server, Linux, Active Directory, GPO, DNS, DHCP</p>
            </div>
            <div class="skill-card">
                <div class="skill-icon">🌐</div>
                <h3>Infrastructure Réseau</h3>
                <p>Cisco, VLAN, Routage, Commutation, Firewall, VPN</p>
            </div>
            <div class="skill-card">
                <div class="skill-icon">🔒</div>
                <h3>Sécurité Informatique</h3>
                <p>Pare-feu, Antivirus, Chiffrement, Audit de sécurité</p>
            </div>
            <div class="skill-card">
                <div class="skill-icon">📊</div>
                <h3>Supervision & Monitoring</h3>
                <p>PRTG, Nagios, Zabbix, Analyse de performances</p>
            </div>
            <div class="skill-card">
                <div class="skill-icon">☁️</div>
                <h3>Cloud & Virtualisation</h3>
                <p>VMware, Hyper-V, AWS, Azure, Docker</p>
            </div>
            <div class="skill-card">
                <div class="skill-icon">🛠️</div>
                <h3>Support & Maintenance</h3>
                <p>Help Desk, Ticketing, Documentation technique</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Projets -->
    <section id="projets" class="section">
        <h2 class="section-title">Projets Réalisés en Entreprise</h2>
        <div class="projects-grid">
            <div class="project-card">
                <h3>Serveur de Messagerie avec Active Directory</h3>
                <p>Installation et configuration complète d'un serveur mail Linux (Postfix + Dovecot) intégré à Active Directory. Gestion des utilisateurs via LDAP, configuration IMAP/POP3/SMTP, et mise en place de Thunderbird côté client.</p>
                <div class="project-tag">Postfix</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Dovecot</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Active Directory</div>
                <div class="project-tag">LDAP</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Ubuntu Server</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Thunderbird</div>
                <div style="margin-top: 1.5rem; text-align: center;">
                    <a href="#" onclick="alert('Veuillez placer le fichier svrmail.pdf dans le même dossier que ce fichier HTML, puis remplacez le # par svrmail.pdf'); return false;" style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2); color: #00d4ff; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #00d4ff; font-size: 0.9rem; transition: all 0.3s ease;">
                        📄 Voir la documentation complète
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-card">
                <h3>Cluster Haute Disponibilité Linux Heartbeat</h3>
                <p>Mise en place d'un cluster de haute disponibilité avec Linux Heartbeat. Configuration de 2 nœuds + 1 client, détection automatique de panne, surveillance de vie (liveness) et basculement automatique des services Apache2.</p>
                <div class="project-tag">Linux Heartbeat</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Haute Disponibilité</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Clustering</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Apache2</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Ubuntu 22.04</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Failover</div>
                <div style="margin-top: 1.5rem; text-align: center;">
                    <a href="#" onclick="alert('Veuillez placer le fichier Heartbeat.pdf dans le même dossier que ce fichier HTML, puis remplacez le # par Heartbeat.pdf'); return false;" style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2); color: #00d4ff; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #00d4ff; font-size: 0.9rem; transition: all 0.3s ease;">
                        📄 Voir la documentation complète
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-card">
                <h3>Déploiement Multi-Sites</h3>
                <p>Masterisation et déploiement de PC sur l'ensemble des sites de Gagneraud Construction (Normandie, IDF, Est et Ouest France). Support à distance via TeamViewer et maintenance du parc informatique.</p>
                <div class="project-tag">Masterisation</div>
                <div class="project-tag">TeamViewer</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Support Multi-Sites</div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-card">
                <h3>Support Télécom & Sécurité</h3>
                <p>Chez Paritel : tests de lignes Orange, réparation d'alarmes via Power Manager, gestion de caméras RXCamView et support utilisateur via système de ticketing.</p>
                <div class="project-tag">Tests Lignes Orange</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Power Manager</div>
                <div class="project-tag">RXCamView</div>
                <div class="project-tag">Ticketing Kairos</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Parcours -->
    <section id="parcours" class="section">
        <h2 class="section-title">Mon Parcours</h2>
        <div class="timeline">
            <div class="timeline-item">
                <div class="timeline-content">
                    <h3>Septembre 2025 - Présent | Gagneraud Construction</h3>
                    <p><strong>Technicien Support Informatique (2ème année BTS SIO)</strong></p>
                    <p>• Masterisation et déploiement de PC<br>
                    • Support informatique multi-sites (Normandie, Nord Paris Gennevilliers, Est et Ouest de la France)<br>
                    • Prise en main à distance via TeamViewer<br>
                    • Maintenance et dépannage du parc informatique</p>
                </div>
                <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-item">
                <div class="timeline-content">
                    <h3>Septembre 2024 - avril 2025 | Paritel</h3>
                    <p><strong>Technicien Support (1ère année BTS SIO)</strong></p>
                    <p>• Tests de lignes Orange<br>
                    • Réparation d'alarmes via logiciel Power Manager<br>
                    • Gestion des caméras via RXCamView<br>
                    • Support utilisateur sur outil de ticketing<br>
                    • Maintenance et résolution d'incidents techniques</p>
                </div>
                <div class="timeline-dot"></div>

            <div class="timeline-item">
                <div class="timeline-content">
                    <h3>Septembre 2018 - Juillet 2020 | Lycée Bâtiment Saint-Lambert</h3>
                    <p><strong>Bac STI2D — Option Architecture & Construction</strong></p>
                    <p>• Sciences pour l'ingénieur<br>
                    • Électronique & Énergie électrique<br>
                    • Génie civil<br>
                    • Sciences et technologies<br>
                    • Sciences et génie des matériaux</p>
                </div>
                <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>


    <!-- CERTIFICATIONS -->
    <section id="certifications" class="section">
        <h2 class="section-title">Certifications</h2>
        <div class="cert-grid">

            <!-- IBM Cloud Essentials -->
            <div class="cert-card">
                <div class="cert-header">
                    <div class="cert-logo cert-logo-ibm">IBM</div>
                    <div class="cert-header-info">
                        <h3 class="cert-name">Cloud Essentials</h3>
                        <p class="cert-issuer">IBM Skills Network</p>
                        <p class="cert-date">📅 Délivré le 30 avril 2025</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <p class="cert-desc">
                    Certification attestant la maîtrise des fondamentaux du cloud computing : modèles de déploiement (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), 
                    virtualisation, conteneurs et principes d'architecture cloud. Délivrée par IBM via la plateforme Credly.
                </p>
                <div class="cert-tags">
                    <span class="project-tag">Cloud Computing</span>
                    <span class="project-tag">IaaS / PaaS / SaaS</span>
                    <span class="project-tag">Virtualisation</span>
                    <span class="project-tag">IBM</span>
                </div>
                <div class="cert-actions">
                    <a href="data:application/pdf;base64," download="Certificat_IBM_Cloud_Essentials_Aboubacar_Kone.pdf" class="cert-btn cert-btn-dl">
                        ⬇️ Télécharger le certificat
                    </a>
                    <a href="https://www.credly.com/badges/0f2456cb-3527-496c-963a-3f19a2950170" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="cert-btn cert-btn-verify">
                        ✅ Vérifier sur Credly
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- CNIL RGPD -->
            <div class="cert-card">
                <div class="cert-header">
                    <div class="cert-logo cert-logo-cnil">CNIL</div>
                    <div class="cert-header-info">
                        <h3 class="cert-name">RGPD — Notions clés</h3>
                        <p class="cert-issuer">Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés</p>
                        <p class="cert-date">📅 Délivré le 12 mai 2026 · Score : 90%</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <p class="cert-desc">
                    Attestation de suivi du Module 1 de l'Atelier RGPD de la CNIL avec un score de 90 %. 
                    Couvre les notions fondamentales du Règlement Général sur la Protection des Données : 
                    principes clés, droits des personnes, obligations des organismes et bases légales du traitement.
                </p>
                <div class="cert-tags">
                    <span class="project-tag">RGPD</span>
                    <span class="project-tag">Protection des données</span>
                    <span class="project-tag">Conformité</span>
                    <span class="project-tag">CNIL</span>
                </div>
                <div class="cert-actions">
                    <a href="data:application/pdf;base64," download="Attestation_RGPD_CNIL_Aboubacar_Kone.pdf" class="cert-btn cert-btn-dl">
                        ⬇️ Télécharger l'attestation
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- =============================================
         VEILLE TECHNOLOGIQUE - Section unifiée avec RSS
    ============================================= -->
    <section id="veille" class="section">
        <h2 class="section-title">Veille Technologique</h2>

        <div class="veille-wrapper">

            <!-- En-tête du dashboard -->
            <div class="vt-header-bar">
                <div>
                    <div class="vt-title-bar">
                        <span class="vt-live-dot"></span>
                        Flux RSS en direct
                        <span class="vt-status-text" id="vt-status">Chargement...</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button class="vt-refresh-btn" id="vt-refresh-btn" onclick="vtLoadFeeds()">
                    🔄 Actualiser
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Compteurs -->
            <div class="vt-stats-row" id="vt-stats" style="display:none;">
                <div class="vt-stat-box">
                    <div class="vt-stat-num" id="vt-stat-total">0</div>
                    <div class="vt-stat-lbl">Articles récupérés</div>
                </div>
                <div class="vt-stat-box">
                    <div class="vt-stat-num" id="vt-stat-secu">0</div>
                    <div class="vt-stat-lbl">Cybersécurité</div>
                </div>
                <div class="vt-stat-box">
                    <div class="vt-stat-num" id="vt-stat-ia">0</div>
                    <div class="vt-stat-lbl">IA & Cloud</div>
                </div>
                <div class="vt-stat-box">
                    <div class="vt-stat-num" id="vt-stat-today">0</div>
                    <div class="vt-stat-lbl">Aujourd'hui</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Sources -->
            <div class="vt-sources-bar">
                <div class="vt-sources-label">Sources actives</div>
                <div class="vt-sources-list">
                    <div class="vt-src-pill"><span class="vt-src-color" style="background:#378ADD;"></span>ZDNet FR</div>
                    <div class="vt-src-pill"><span class="vt-src-color" style="background:#3B6D11;"></span>LeMagIT</div>
                    <div class="vt-src-pill"><span class="vt-src-color" style="background:#E24B4A;"></span>CERT-FR</div>
                    <div class="vt-src-pill"><span class="vt-src-color" style="background:#7F77DD;"></span>01net</div>
                    <div class="vt-src-pill"><span class="vt-src-color" style="background:#BA7517;"></span>Silicon.fr</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Filtres par catégorie -->
            <div class="vt-filters-row">
                <div class="vt-filter-chip active" data-cat="all" onclick="vtFilter(this)">Tout voir</div>
                <div class="vt-filter-chip" data-cat="Sécurité" onclick="vtFilter(this)">🔒 Cybersécurité</div>
                <div class="vt-filter-chip" data-cat="Réseau" onclick="vtFilter(this)">🌐 Réseau</div>
                <div class="vt-filter-chip" data-cat="Cloud" onclick="vtFilter(this)">☁️ Cloud</div>
                <div class="vt-filter-chip" data-cat="IA" onclick="vtFilter(this)">🤖 IA</div>
                <div class="vt-filter-chip" data-cat="Système" onclick="vtFilter(this)">🖥️ Système</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Grille d'articles -->
            <div class="vt-articles-grid" id="vt-grid">
                <div class="vt-skeleton"></div>
                <div class="vt-skeleton"></div>
                <div class="vt-skeleton"></div>
                <div class="vt-skeleton"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Lien tableau de synthèse -->
            <div class="vt-tableau-link">
                <a href="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PYfG_wdtm_rrbBW_4Rd6X3xQ1K_UUDbD/edit?gid=478715316#gid=478715316"
                   target="_blank" class="cta-button" style="font-size: 1rem;">
                    📈 Consulter mon tableau de Synthèse
                </a>
            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Contact -->
    <section id="contact" class="section">
        <h2 class="section-title">Me Contacter</h2>
        <div class="contact-form">
            <form id="contactForm">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <input type="text" id="name" placeholder="Votre nom" required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <input type="email" id="email" placeholder="Votre email" required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <textarea id="message" placeholder="Votre message" rows="6" required></textarea>
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="cta-button">Envoyer le message</button>
            </form>
            <div id="formStatus" style="margin-top: 1rem; text-align: center; display: none;"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-info" style="margin-top: 3rem; text-align: center;">
            <p style="font-size: 1.1rem; color: #a0a0a0;">Ou contactez-moi directement :</p>
            <a href="mailto:aboubcarkone@gmail.com" class="contact-link">
                📧 aboubcarkone@gmail.com
            </a>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer class="footer">
        <p>&copy; 2024 Aboubacar Kone - Portfolio BTS SIO SISR | Tous droits réservés</p>
    </footer>

    <script>
        /* =============================================
           JAVASCRIPT GÉNÉRAL DU PORTFOLIO
        ============================================= */

        // Effet parallaxe au scroll
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            const scrolled = window.pageYOffset;
            const rate = scrolled * -0.5;
            document.querySelector('.hero').style.transform = `translateY(${rate}px)`;
        });

        // Animation des particules
        function createParticles() {
            const particlesContainer = document.querySelector('.particles');
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const particle = document.createElement('div');
                particle.className = 'particle';
                particle.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
                particle.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 6 + 's';
                particle.style.animationDuration = (Math.random() * 3 + 3) + 's';
                particlesContainer.appendChild(particle);
            }
        }

        // Smooth scroll
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
                if (target) {
                    const navbarHeight = document.querySelector('.navbar').offsetHeight;
                    window.scrollTo({ top: target.offsetTop - navbarHeight, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        });

        // Animation d'apparition au scroll
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                    entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' });

        document.querySelectorAll('.skill-card, .project-card, .timeline-content').forEach(el => {
            el.style.opacity = '0';
            el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
            el.style.transition = 'all 0.6s ease';
            observer.observe(el);
        });

        // Navbar scroll
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            const navbar = document.querySelector('.navbar');
            navbar.style.background = window.scrollY > 100
                ? 'rgba(10, 14, 39, 0.98)'
                : 'rgba(10, 14, 39, 0.95)';
        });

        // Formulaire de contact
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            createParticles();

            const contactForm = document.getElementById('contactForm');
            const formStatus  = document.getElementById('formStatus');

            contactForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const name    = document.getElementById('name').value;
                const email   = document.getElementById('email').value;
                const message = document.getElementById('message').value;
                const subject = encodeURIComponent(`Message de ${name} - Portfolio`);
                const body    = encodeURIComponent(`Nom: ${name}\nEmail: ${email}\n\nMessage:\n${message}`);
                window.location.href = `mailto:aboubcarkone@gmail.com?subject=${subject}&body=${body}`;
                formStatus.style.display = 'block';
                formStatus.style.color   = '#00ff88';
                formStatus.textContent   = "✓ Votre client email va s'ouvrir. Pensez à envoyer le message !";
                setTimeout(() => {
                    contactForm.reset();
                    setTimeout(() => { formStatus.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
                }, 1000);
            });
        });

        /* =============================================
           VEILLE TECHNOLOGIQUE - Flux RSS multi-proxy
        ============================================= */

        const VT_FEEDS = [
            { name: 'ZDNet FR',   url: 'https://www.zdnet.fr/feeds/rss/' },
            { name: 'LeMagIT',    url: 'https://www.lemagit.fr/rss/ToutLesMagazines.xml' },
            { name: 'Silicon.fr', url: 'https://www.silicon.fr/feed' },
            { name: 'CERT-FR',    url: 'https://www.cert.ssi.gouv.fr/feed/' },
            { name: '01net',      url: 'https://www.01net.com/rss.xml' }
        ];

        // Liste de proxies CORS essayés dans l'ordre
        const VT_PROXIES = [
            url => `https://corsproxy.io/?${encodeURIComponent(url)}`,
            url => `https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`,
            url => `https://thingproxy.freeboard.io/fetch/${url}`,
            url => `https://cors-anywhere.herokuapp.com/${url}`
        ];

        // Articles de secours affichés si TOUS les proxies échouent
        const VT_FALLBACK = [
            { title: "CERT-FR : Bulletin de sécurité Microsoft du mardi des correctifs", url: "https://www.cert.ssi.gouv.fr/", source: "CERT-FR", date: new Date().toISOString(), cat: "Sécurité", excerpt: "Publication mensuelle des correctifs de sécurité Microsoft. Consultez le site du CERT-FR pour les dernières alertes." },
            { title: "Mise à jour critique de sécurité pour les systèmes Linux", url: "https://www.zdnet.fr/", source: "ZDNet FR", date: new Date(Date.now()-3600000).toISOString(), cat: "Système", excerpt: "Des vulnérabilités critiques ont été identifiées dans le noyau Linux. Des mises à jour sont fortement recommandées." },
            { title: "Zero Trust : la nouvelle approche incontournable de la cybersécurité", url: "https://www.silicon.fr/", source: "Silicon.fr", date: new Date(Date.now()-7200000).toISOString(), cat: "Sécurité", excerpt: "Le modèle Zero Trust s'impose comme standard pour sécuriser les accès aux ressources d'entreprise." },
            { title: "Kubernetes 1.31 : les nouveautés pour les conteneurs en production", url: "https://www.lemagit.fr/", source: "LeMagIT", date: new Date(Date.now()-10800000).toISOString(), cat: "Cloud", excerpt: "La nouvelle version de Kubernetes apporte des améliorations majeures pour la gestion des conteneurs." },
            { title: "Active Directory : bonnes pratiques pour sécuriser votre annuaire", url: "https://www.zdnet.fr/", source: "ZDNet FR", date: new Date(Date.now()-86400000).toISOString(), cat: "Système", excerpt: "Sécuriser Active Directory est essentiel pour protéger l'ensemble du SI. Découvrez les meilleures pratiques." },
            { title: "VPN d'entreprise : comment choisir la bonne solution en 2025", url: "https://www.silicon.fr/", source: "Silicon.fr", date: new Date(Date.now()-90000000).toISOString(), cat: "Réseau", excerpt: "Face à la multiplication du télétravail, le choix d'un VPN fiable et sécurisé est devenu stratégique." },
            { title: "L'IA générative transforme les métiers de la cybersécurité", url: "https://www.lemagit.fr/", source: "LeMagIT", date: new Date(Date.now()-172800000).toISOString(), cat: "IA", excerpt: "Les outils d'IA aident désormais les équipes SOC à détecter et répondre aux incidents plus rapidement." },
            { title: "Phishing : recrudescence des attaques ciblant les entreprises françaises", url: "https://www.cert.ssi.gouv.fr/", source: "CERT-FR", date: new Date(Date.now()-176400000).toISOString(), cat: "Sécurité", excerpt: "Le CERT-FR alerte sur une vague de campagnes de phishing sophistiquées visant les PME françaises." }
        ];

        const VT_KEYWORDS = {
            'Sécurité': ['sécurité','cyber','hack','vulnérabil','ransomware','phishing','malware','chiffrement','firewall','menace','attaque','faille','patch','CVE','CERT','ANSSI','zero-day'],
            'Réseau':   ['réseau','VPN','firewall','routage','VLAN','Cisco','switch','pare-feu','DNS','IP','TCP','WiFi','5G','fibre'],
            'Cloud':    ['cloud','AWS','Azure','GCP','kubernetes','docker','conteneur','SaaS','serverless','microservice','hybride'],
            'IA':       ['intelligence artificielle','IA','machine learning','deep learning','LLM','GPT','neural','algorithme','automatisation','ChatGPT'],
            'Système':  ['windows','linux','serveur','active directory','déploiement','virtualisation','VMware','Hyper-V','Ubuntu','RedHat','mise à jour','patch']
        };

        let vtArticles = [];
        let vtCurrentFilter = 'all';

        function vtCategorize(text) {
            const t = text.toLowerCase();
            for (const [cat, kw] of Object.entries(VT_KEYWORDS)) {
                if (kw.some(k => t.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) return cat;
            }
            return 'Système';
        }

        function vtTimeAgo(dateStr) {
            const d = new Date(dateStr);
            if (isNaN(d)) return '';
            const diff = (Date.now() - d) / 1000;
            if (diff < 60)     return 'À l\'instant';
            if (diff < 3600)   return Math.floor(diff / 60) + ' min';
            if (diff < 86400)  return Math.floor(diff / 3600) + 'h';
            if (diff < 172800) return 'Hier';
            return d.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' });
        }

        function vtIsToday(dateStr) {
            const d = new Date(dateStr);
            return !isNaN(d) && d.toDateString() === new Date().toDateString();
        }

        // Parse un flux XML RSS/Atom brut en articles
        function vtParseXML(xmlText, feedName) {
            try {
                const parser = new DOMParser();
                const doc = parser.parseFromString(xmlText, 'text/xml');
                const items = [...doc.querySelectorAll('item, entry')];
                return items.slice(0, 8).map(item => {
                    const title   = item.querySelector('title')?.textContent?.trim() || '';
                    const link    = item.querySelector('link')?.textContent?.trim()
                                 || item.querySelector('link')?.getAttribute('href') || '#';
                    const pubDate = item.querySelector('pubDate, published, updated')?.textContent?.trim() || '';
                    const desc    = item.querySelector('description, summary, content')?.textContent?.trim() || '';
                    const clean   = desc.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').slice(0, 160).trim();
                    return {
                        title,
                        url: link,
                        source: feedName,
                        date: pubDate,
                        excerpt: clean,
                        cat: vtCategorize(title + ' ' + clean)
                    };
                }).filter(a => a.title);
            } catch { return []; }
        }

        // Essaie les proxies un par un pour un feed donné
        async function vtFetchFeed(feed) {
            for (const proxyFn of VT_PROXIES) {
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(proxyFn(feed.url), { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(6000) });
                    if (!res.ok) continue;
                    const text = await res.text();
                    // Certains proxies renvoient du JSON wrappé (allorigins)
                    let xml = text;
                    if (text.trim().startsWith('{')) {
                        try { xml = JSON.parse(text).contents || text; } catch { xml = text; }
                    }
                    const articles = vtParseXML(xml, feed.name);
                    if (articles.length > 0) return articles;
                } catch { /* proxy suivant */ }
            }
            return [];
        }

        function vtRenderCards(articles) {
            const grid = document.getElementById('vt-grid');
            const filtered = vtCurrentFilter === 'all'
                ? articles
                : articles.filter(a => a.cat === vtCurrentFilter);

            if (!filtered.length) {
                grid.innerHTML = '<div class="vt-empty-msg">Aucun article dans cette catégorie pour l\'instant.</div>';
                return;
            }

            grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(a => `
                <div class="vt-article-card">
                    <div class="vt-card-top">
                        <div class="vt-article-title">${vtEscape(a.title)}</div>
                        <span class="vt-badge badge-${a.cat}">${a.cat}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="vt-card-meta">
                        <span>📰 ${vtEscape(a.source)}</span>
                        <span style="color:#404040;">·</span>
                        <span>🕐 ${vtTimeAgo(a.date)}</span>
                    </div>
                    ${a.excerpt ? `<div class="vt-excerpt">${vtEscape(a.excerpt)}</div>` : ''}
                    <a class="vt-read-link" href="${a.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Lire l'article ↗</a>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function vtEscape(str) {
            return String(str)
                .replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;')
                .replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
        }

        function vtUpdateStats(articles, isFallback) {
            document.getElementById('vt-stats').style.display = '';
            document.getElementById('vt-stat-total').textContent = isFallback ? '—' : articles.length;
            document.getElementById('vt-stat-secu').textContent  = articles.filter(a => a.cat === 'Sécurité').length;
            document.getElementById('vt-stat-ia').textContent    = articles.filter(a => a.cat === 'IA' || a.cat === 'Cloud').length;
            document.getElementById('vt-stat-today').textContent = isFallback ? '—' : articles.filter(a => vtIsToday(a.date)).length;
        }

        async function vtLoadFeeds() {
            const btn      = document.getElementById('vt-refresh-btn');
            const statusEl = document.getElementById('vt-status');
            const grid     = document.getElementById('vt-grid');

            btn.disabled = true;
            grid.innerHTML = '<div class="vt-skeleton"></div><div class="vt-skeleton"></div><div class="vt-skeleton"></div><div class="vt-skeleton"></div>';
            statusEl.textContent = '— Récupération en cours…';

            const results = await Promise.allSettled(VT_FEEDS.map(vtFetchFeed));
            const live = results.flatMap(r => r.status === 'fulfilled' ? r.value : []);
            live.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date) - new Date(a.date));

            if (live.length > 0) {
                // Flux live OK
                vtArticles = live;
                vtRenderCards(vtArticles);
                vtUpdateStats(vtArticles, false);
                const now = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
                statusEl.textContent = `— Mis à jour à ${now} · ${vtArticles.length} articles`;
            } else {
                // Tous les proxies ont échoué → articles de secours
                vtArticles = VT_FALLBACK;
                vtRenderCards(vtArticles);
                vtUpdateStats(vtArticles, true);
                statusEl.textContent = '— Mode hors-ligne · Articles représentatifs';
            }

            btn.disabled = false;
        }

        function vtFilter(el) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.vt-filter-chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
            el.classList.add('active');
            vtCurrentFilter = el.dataset.cat;
            vtRenderCards(vtArticles);
        }

        // Chargement initial + auto-refresh toutes les 5 minutes
        vtLoadFeeds();
        setInterval(vtLoadFeeds, 5 * 60 * 1000);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
